series_metadata.series_description: Displays a daily cash reconciliation, number of permits issued by volume, log sheet summary of cash and check sales and advance payments used. Also a total escrow account payments plus deposits and amounts used to show total of all escrow accounts daily. Submitted daily to the Office of Accounting and Auditing with the OS-10 permit logs and credit transmittal sheet for daily deposit.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain paper documents until scanned, then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain scanned images for two years plus current year, then delete., Paper: Recycle ; Electronic: Delete
